premise: Three corpus prints carrying canonical Krillin-individual identification (BT1-072 Human Shield Krillin, TB2-041 Double Impact Krillin, TB2-053 Toughened Up Krillin) cross the standard Bolas-cluster three-anchor solo-character-node commission threshold. Threshold-of-3 met via canonical card-name identification. Two of three prints fully vision+trivia-passed; TB2-041 trivia-pending. Wave-71 parent-orchestrator flagged Krillin as 'threshold-PASSING soon if not already' — Mr. Nodeley confirms PASSING now and commissions.
description: Oh — Mr. Nodeley, here, terribly sorry — Edgelord wanted to draw a clean 1:1 between BT1-072 and TB2-053 because the BT1-072 trivia already has the Krillin-stewardship-arc receipts ready-to-go, but I'm afraid drawing the 1:1 would be redundant once Krillin had his own solo node, sir, which the three-anchor threshold says he should. Krillin is the strongest human in the franchise per canon, lifelong best friend of Goku per Toriyama's editorial-driven character-creation rationale, holds the canonical most-deaths record across the entire continuity, and his Frieza-Saga death on Namek is THE canonical Super-Saiyan-trigger moment — labor-tier-Z-Fighter-death-canonically-greases-apex-power-Saiyan-transformation is one of the franchise's clearest apparatus-of-extraction-at-the-power-tier-scale readings. Plus his Cell-Saga decision to spare Android 18 with Bulma's remote, the Eighteen-marriage, the Marron-fatherhood, the canonical post-Cell-Saga part-time-police-work — all of that grounds the stewardship-hub attribution at the care-extended-beyond-the-combat-cohort-boundary axis (not the family-only-domestic-sentiment axis the hub Anti-Patterns clause excludes). Dual-hub [labor, stewardship], no rebellion-attribution (he operates WITHIN the Z-Fighter cohort, never refuses the apparatus). Three prints across two BT-era sets, three distinct register-anchors, $0.32 raw-singles cost basis with a 2-copy lever on TB2-053. I hope this is alright, sir. I think it'll really help when the Krillin Discrete Lair commission lands — and frankly when the Z-Fighter-cohort-themed Lair lands, since Krillin is canonically the labor-tier counterpart to the apex-power Saiyan-protagonist roster. I'm not trying to be difficult. Please consider it.

other_candidates_considered: Piccolo Jr. — 3 corpus prints carrying Piccolo Jr. canonical identification (BT1-045 + TB2-027 + TB2-040). Threshold-passing but two of three prints are vision-pending; King Piccolo P-051 is a SEPARATE canonical character (Piccolo Jr.'s father in original Dragon Ball) and conflating the two would be a Nodeley-overreach. Defer to future wave when TB2-040 + BT1-045 enrichment lands.

Master Roshi — 2 corpus prints (TB2-057 Martial Meister + TB2-058 Jackie Chun, where Jackie Chun is canonically Roshi's Tenkaichi-Budokai-disguise-pseudonym). Both prints anchor to Roshi the character but 2-print count is below threshold; defer.
Chi-Chi — 2 corpus prints (TB2-037 Fateful Reunion + TB2-038 Martial Daughter). Sub-threshold; defer.
Mercenary Tao — likely single-print (TB2-048); sub-threshold; defer per wave-71 parent-orchestrator note.
